title: coristospermum lucidum subsp. huteri
intro: Coristospermum lucidum subsp. huteri is a sub-species of the Coristospermum lucidum plant, a type of flowering plant in the family Winteraceae. It is native to New Caledonia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant activity. Coristospermum lucidum subsp. huteri can be prepared into herbal extracts, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, but further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
